sentences.text: You have reached the voicemail system, please enter the extension of the person you are calling at this time. If you do not know the extension press one now for a company directory. If you would like them please enter at least the first three letters of the person's last name for Q press seven for. Justina Chaplin extension eight nine eight three to select this extension press one to hear the next name press two to repeat the current Michael Chan extension five zero four zero to select this extension press one to hear the next name press two to repeat Randy Chandra, Paul extension five zero one three to select this extension press one to hear the next name press two to re, Helen chain extension five zero seven six to select this extension press one, Karen charge extension two nine eight six to select this extension press one to repeat the. You have reached the voicemail box of Karen charge, you may leave a message after the tone.

Hi, this message is for Karen Sharp. This is Alex with our check you could give me a call back on my cell best number is two six nine three one three one five one eight thanks so much and looking forward to hearing back by now.
